text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap has been struggling with exhaustion,
so I bring her to the infirmary to get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything. I'll do as you suggest and
relax for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... All that food must have made me sleepy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I'm just gonna take... a little nap...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Where am I? I thought I was at the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...What? Is that the statue of the Three
Goddesses? Maybe not... They look pretty real.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's wild out here in the city. They've got
goddesses roaming around and everything. Wait
until I tell everyone back home about this... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They're waving at me. Are they... telling me to
chase them?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I guess... they want to race me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
No problem! I'd be more than happy to accept
the challenge! Here I come, goddesses!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait. This is... the infirmary? Hm... I must have
been dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That was fun though. I couldn't catch up to them,
but I felt like I could run forever and ever without
getting tired.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Heh, I feel kind of refreshed now. Maybe a good rest was what I needed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having regained her energy, Oguri Cap leaves
the infirmary with a spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huh?! ...The infirmary? So it was just a dream.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Who would have guessed the Three Goddesses
would turn into a big bowl of stew while running?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I was literally knocked off my feet. Sigh... If only I could have had a small taste before waking up... Just one tiny sip...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fixated on her stew dream, Oguri Cap is unable
to get the rest she needs.
